name: P90 | 沙漠 DDPAT
collection: 2021 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
collectionZh: 2021 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
descriptionEn: Easily recognizable for its unique bullpup design, the P90 is a great weapon to shoot on the move due to its high-capacity magazine and low recoil. It has been painted using a Digital Disruptive Pattern (DDPAT) hydrographic. By the time you're close enough to notice the pixels it's already too late
descriptionZh: 因其独特的无托设计而更加容易辨认，多亏了 P90 高容量的弹匣和低后坐力，这把武器非常适合边移动边射击。 这把武器使用数字迷彩（DDPAT）图案的花纹进行了涂装。 当你能注意到像素图案的时候，已经为时已晚了
